Part.Source:
//Gravar tabelas ibs cbs For &SdtImpostosIbsCbs in &SdtImpostos.IbsCbs
For Each Order IbsCbsDta Where IbsCbsDta =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsDtaIni IbsUnTax =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsUntax IbsUfTax =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsUfTax IbsMunTax =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsMuntax Exit When none new IbsCbsDta =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsDtaIni IbsUnTax =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsUntax IbsUfTax =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsUfTax IbsMunTax =&SdtImpostosIbsCbs.IbsMuntax EndNEw Endfor EndFor
Commit
//grava situacao tributaria For &SdtImpostosCst in &SdtImpostos.Cst
For Each ORder CltSitCod Where CltSitCod = &SdtImpostosCst.CltSitCod CltSitNom = &SdtImpostosCst.CltNom CltSts.FromString(&SdtImpostosCst.cltSts)
CltSitCodNom = &SdtImpostosCst.CltSitCod + ' - ' + &SdtImpostosCst.CltNom
Cltind_gIBSCBS = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gIBSCBS = true, 'S', 'N') Cltind_gIBSCBSMono = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gIBSCBSMono = true, 'S', 'N')
CltIsRedBas = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_RedutorBC = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsDif = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gDif = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsTrnsCred = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gTransfCred = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsPresZFM = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gCredPresIBSZFM = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsAju = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gAjusteCompet = true, 'S', 'N')
Exit When none new CltSitCod = &SdtImpostosCst.CltSitCod CltSitNom = &SdtImpostosCst.CltNom
CltSitCodNom = &SdtImpostosCst.CltSitCod + ' - ' + &SdtImpostosCst.CltNom
CltSts.FromString(&SdtImpostosCst.cltSts)
Cltind_gIBSCBS = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gIBSCBS = true, 'S', 'N') Cltind_gIBSCBSMono = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gIBSCBSMono = true, 'S', 'N')
CltIsRedBas = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_RedutorBC = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsDif = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gDif = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsTrnsCred = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gTransfCred = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsPresZFM = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gCredPresIBSZFM = true, 'S', 'N') CltIsAju = iif(&sdtImpostosCst.Cltind_gAjusteCompet = true, 'S', 'N') EndNew EndFor EndFor
Commit
//Grava Classificacao Tributaria For &SdtImpostosClassTrib in &SdtImpostos.ClassTrib For Each ORder CltSitCod, CltClsTrib Where CltSitCod = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsSitCod Where CltClsTrib = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsTrib
CltClsNomRed = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsNomRed
CltClsTribNom = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsTrib + ' - ' + &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsNomRed
CltClsRedIbs = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClspRedIBS CltClsRedCbs = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClspRedCBS //CltClsIsRedBas = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_RedutorBC = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsIsTribReg = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_gTribRegular = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsIsPre = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_gCredPresOper = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsIsExtCred = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_gEstornoCred = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsTipAliq.FromString(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsTipoDeAliquota) CltClsIsCte = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindCTe CltClsIsCteOs = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindCTeOS CltClsIsNfse = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindNFSe CltClsIsNfe = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindNFe CltClsIsNfce = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindNFCe CltClsDtaIni = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsDtaIni CltClsDtaFim = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsDtaFim Exit When none New CltSitCod = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsSitCod CltClsTrib = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsTrib
CltClsTribNom = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsTrib + ' - ' + &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsNomRed
CltClsNomRed = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsNomRed CltClsRedIbs = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClspRedIBS CltClsRedCbs = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClspRedCBS //CltClsIsRedBas = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_RedutorBC = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsIsTribReg = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_gTribRegular = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsIsPre = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_gCredPresOper = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsIsExtCred = iif(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsind_gEstornoCred = true, 'S', 'N') CltClsTipAliq.FromString(&SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsTipoDeAliquota) CltClsIsCte = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindCTe CltClsIsCteOs = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindCTeOS CltClsIsNfse = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindNFSe CltClsIsNfe = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindNFe CltClsIsNfce = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsindNFCe CltClsDtaIni = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsDtaIni CltClsDtaFim = &SdtImpostosClassTrib.CltClsDtaFim EndNEw EndFor EndFor
Commit
//anexos For &SdtImpostosAnexos in &SdtImpostos.Anexos For Each Order AnxCod Where AnxCod = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxCod AnxNom = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxNom
AnxDesc = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxSubTit AnxCst = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxCst AnxClassTrib = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxClassTrib AnxDtaIni = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxDtaIni AnxDtaFim = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxDtaFim Exit When none New AnxCod = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxCod AnxNom = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxNom
AnxDesc = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxSubTit AnxCst = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxCst AnxClassTrib = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxClassTrib AnxDtaIni = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxDtaIni AnxDtaFim = &SdtImpostosAnexos.AnxDtaFim
EndNew EndFor
EndFor
Commit
//Tipos servicos For &SdtImpostosTiposServicos in &SdtImpostos.TiposServicos For Each ORder TipSerCod Where TipSerCod = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerCod TipSerNom = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerNom TipSerSts = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerSts TipSerCodNom = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerCod + ' - ' + &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerNom TipSerDtaMod = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerDtaMod Exit When none new TipSerCod = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerCod TipSerNom = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerNom TipSerSts = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerSts TipSerCodNom = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerCod + ' - ' + &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerNom TipSerDtaMod = &SdtImpostosTiposServicos.TipSerDtaMod EndNew ENdFor
EndFor
Commit
